'''鈭歾h-m-b''' ('''zhamaba''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:backshot|backshot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:backshot|backshot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-m-b
|-
! Lemma
| zhamaba
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhamabithi|zhamabithi]] || [[word:zhamabiji|zhamabiji]] || [[word:zhamabishi|zhamabishi]] || [[word:zhamabi|zhamabi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamabuthuth|zhamabuthuth]] || [[word:zhamabujuj|zhamabujuj]] || [[word:zhamabushush|zhamabushush]] || [[word:zhamab|zhamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamabuthu|zhamabuthu]] || [[word:zhamabuju|zhamabuju]] || [[word:zhamabushu|zhamabushu]] || [[word:zhamabu|zhamabu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamabufuth|zhamabufuth]] || [[word:zhamabufuj|zhamabufuj]] || [[word:zhamabufush|zhamabufush]] || [[word:zhamabuf|zhamabuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhamabethe|zhamabethe]] || [[word:zhamabeje|zhamabeje]] || [[word:zhamabeshe|zhamabeshe]] || [[word:zhamabe|zhamabe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamabothoth|zhamabothoth]] || [[word:zhamabojoj|zhamabojoj]] || [[word:zhamaboshosh|zhamaboshosh]] || [[word:zhamab|zhamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamabotho|zhamabotho]] || [[word:zhamabojo|zhamabojo]] || [[word:zhamabosho|zhamabosho]] || [[word:zhamabo|zhamabo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamabofoth|zhamabofoth]] || [[word:zhamabofoj|zhamabofoj]] || [[word:zhamabofosh|zhamabofosh]] || [[word:zhamabof|zhamabof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhamab忙th忙|zhamab忙th忙]] || [[word:zhamab忙j忙|zhamab忙j忙]] || [[word:zhamab忙sh忙|zhamab忙sh忙]] || [[word:zhamab忙|zhamab忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhamabathath|zhamabathath]] || [[word:zhamabajaj|zhamabajaj]] || [[word:zhamabashash|zhamabashash]] || [[word:zhamab|zhamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhamabatha|zhamabatha]] || [[word:zhamabaja|zhamabaja]] || [[word:zhamabasha|zhamabasha]] || [[word:zhamaba|zhamaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhamabafath|zhamabafath]] || [[word:zhamabafaj|zhamabafaj]] || [[word:zhamabafash|zhamabafash]] || [[word:zhamabaf|zhamabaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhamabasha|zhamabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhamabasha|gozhamabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhamabasha|gokizhamabasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhamabn眉sha|zhamabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhamabnkn眉sha|gozhamabnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhamabn眉sha|gokizhamabn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhamabsh毛sha|zhamabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhamabnksh毛sha|gozhamabnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhamabsh毛sha|gokizhamabsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhamabrosha|zhamabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhamabnkrosha|gozhamabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhamabrosha|gokizhamabrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamabmusha|zhamabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhamabnkmusha|gozhamabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamabmusha|gokizhamabmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhamabsherasha|zhamabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhamabnksherasha|gozhamabnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhamabsherasha|gokizhamabsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhamabngasha|zhamabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhamabnkngasha|gozhamabnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhamabngasha|gokizhamabngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhamabyasha|zhamabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhamabnkyasha|gozhamabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhamabyasha|gokizhamabyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhamabyamasha|zhamabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhamabnkyamasha|gozhamabnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhamabyamasha|gokizhamabyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhamabn眉sh毛sha|zhamabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhamabnkn眉sh毛sha|gozhamabnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhamabn眉sh毛sha|gokizhamabn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhamabn眉rosha|zhamabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhamabnkn眉rosha|gozhamabnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhamabn眉rosha|gokizhamabn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamabn眉musha|zhamabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhamabnkn眉musha|gozhamabnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamabn眉musha|gokizhamabn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhamabsh毛n眉sha|zhamabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhamabnksh毛n眉sha|gozhamabnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhamabsh毛n眉sha|gokizhamabsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhamabsh毛rosha|zhamabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhamabnksh毛rosha|gozhamabnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhamabsh毛rosha|gokizhamabsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamabsh毛musha|zhamabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhamabnksh毛musha|gozhamabnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamabsh毛musha|gokizhamabsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhamabron眉sha|zhamabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhamabnkron眉sha|gozhamabnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhamabron眉sha|gokizhamabron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhamabrosh毛sha|zhamabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhamabnkrosh毛sha|gozhamabnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhamabrosh毛sha|gokizhamabrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhamabromusha|zhamabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhamabnkromusha|gozhamabnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhamabromusha|gokizhamabromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhamabmun眉sha|zhamabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhamabnkmun眉sha|gozhamabnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhamabmun眉sha|gokizhamabmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhamabmush毛sha|zhamabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhamabnkmush毛sha|gozhamabnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhamabmush毛sha|gokizhamabmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhamabmurosha|zhamabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhamabnkmurosha|gozhamabnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhamabmurosha|gokizhamabmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhamab|zhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zh忙m忙b|zh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhamab|hozhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozh忙m忙b|hozh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhamab|hohozhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozh忙m忙b|hohozh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉zhamab|n眉zhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉zh忙m忙b|n眉zh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zhamab|n眉n眉zhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉zh忙m忙b|n眉n眉zh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂zhamab|n茂zhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂zh忙m忙b|n茂zh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zhamab|n茂n茂zhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂zh忙m忙b|n茂n茂zh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhamab|luzhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzh忙m忙b|luzh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhamab|luluzhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzh忙m忙b|luluzh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhamab|lizhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizh忙m忙b|lizh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhamab|lilizhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizh忙m忙b|lilizh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhamab|kozhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozh忙m忙b|kozh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhamab|kokozhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozh忙m忙b|kokozh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhamab|kezhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezh忙m忙b|kezh忙m忙b]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhamab|kekezhamab]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezh忙m忙b|kekezh忙m忙b]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
